description: Hybrid LLM agent. Every 100 ticks the LLM picks one of WORKER_RUSH / LIGHT_RUSH / HEAVY_RUSH / RANGED_RUSH based on visible enemy composition, with a counter-triangle decision procedure (Ranged beats Heavy, Heavy beats Light, Light beats Ranged) and a stickiness rule that keeps the current strategy unless the enemy reveals a new unit type. Each tick the chosen rush bot (WorkerRushPlusPlus / LightRush / HeavyRush / RangedRush) executes.
